docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED) SERVED MAR-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY COX, PETER HERNANDEZ, JOSE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF PETER COX IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY COX, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COX, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,600.00, AWARD TO PLAINTIFF TO DEFRAY MEDICAL AND PAIN AND SUFFERING EXPENSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COX, PETER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
